title.purpose: Modal and settings headings; the largest type in the system (16px). No display tier exists.

body.purpose: Base 14px size: connection targets, settings rows, prompts.

control.purpose: 13px — buttons, inputs, tabs, nav items, context-menu items. The dominant interface size.

label.purpose: 11px/600 0.1em uppercase Faint section eyebrows over grouped settings regions.

mono.purpose: JetBrains Mono — renders terminal content only; forbidden in chrome.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: The single elevation token. Modals, context menus, status pill only — anything that floats above the black desktop.

shadows.name: primary-inset
shadows.purpose: Raised light primary button: top highlight + soft cast.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Hover/border/background state changes on rows, buttons, nav, tabs.

motion.name: status-reveal
motion.purpose: Status pill fade + 6px translate-up on show.

breakpoints.name: narrow-launcher
breakpoints.purpose: Launcher collapses its two-column grid to a single stacked column.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The quiet secondary button: a faint wash with a dim hairline and muted text that brightens on hover. Recedes next to the raised primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #9aa0ab; padding: 9px 18px; font: 400 13px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.12s ease, background 0.12s ease, color 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #e7e9ee; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(140,170,210,0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Button (raised dark)
components.description: The affirmative action — a raised dark surface with a bright hairline and inset highlight. Reads as the action without out-shining the terminal.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.26); border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #363a43 0%, #2b2e36 100%); color: #e7e9ee; padding: 9px 18px; font: 600 13px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1), 0 2px 6px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); transition: border-color 0.12s ease, filter 0.12s ease, transform 0.04s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.42); filter: brightness(1.1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Translucent-black filled field with hairline border; focus brightens border, no glow.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; } .ds-field > span { font: 400 12px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #9aa0ab; } .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.22); padding: 9px 11px; font: 400 13px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #e7e9ee; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7079; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.32); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.32); }

components.name: Connection Row
components.description: Launcher's signature element: flush row, fills on hover, transport pill + chevron.
components.css: .ds-conn-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; width: 100%; padding: 13px 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #e7e9ee; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease; } .ds-conn-row:hover { background: #1f2127; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); } .ds-conn-row::after { content: '›'; margin-left: auto; color: #6b7079; font-size: 17px; opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-3px); transition: opacity 0.14s ease, transform 0.14s ease; } .ds-conn-row:hover::after { opacity: 0.8; transform: translateX(0); } .ds-conn-pill { flex: 0 0 auto; font: 700 10px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #9aa0ab; background: #1f2127; } .ds-conn-pill-et { color: #9adfff; border-color: rgba(108,207,246,0.4); } .ds-conn-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; min-width: 0; } .ds-conn-target { font: 500 14px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-conn-meta { font: 400 12px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #6b7079; }

components.name: Caption Tab
components.description: ChromeOS-style in-window tab with leading status dot and close button; transparent until active.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 2px; align-items: stretch; background: #000; padding: 4px 6px 0; } .ds-tab { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; max-width: 200px; padding: 0 6px 0 12px; height: 30px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; background: transparent; color: #9aa0ab; font: 400 12.5px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tab:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #e7e9ee; } .ds-tab[aria-selected='true'] { background: #1f2127; color: #e7e9ee; } .ds-tab-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #9aa0ab; } .ds-tab-dot[data-state='connected'] { display: none; } .ds-tab-dot[data-state='connecting'] { background: #e0b341; } .ds-tab-dot[data-state='error'] { background: #e0574b; } .ds-tab-close { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; color: inherit; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-tab-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); opacity: 1; }

components.name: Transport Pill
components.description: Tiny rounded tag marking transport type; the only sanctioned colored chip.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; font: 700 10px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #9aa0ab; background: #1f2127; } .ds-pill-mosh { color: #a5f3b1; border-color: rgba(123,216,143,0.4); }

narrative.overview: Gosh is a dark instrument panel built to recede. The terminal is the only surface that earns brightness; every launcher row, dialog, tab, and settings control around it is a calm, low-contrast control that exists to get the user connected and then disappear. The system is monochrome by conviction — a single cool-gray ramp from near-black to off-white carries 95% of the interface. Surfaces are soft, not sharp: gently-gradiented panels, 12px radii, hairline white-on-black dividers, and shadows that appear only when an element genuinely floats above the black desktop. Color enters in exactly three places — transport pills, status dots, and the one light primary button. This system explicitly rejects the iTerm2 / heavy-configurator aesthetic.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome cool-gray ramp; color reserved for status and transport identity only.
Dark by default; the terminal canvas is true black.
Soft surfaces: 8–12px radii, subtle vertical gradients, hairline borders.
Depth on demand: flat in-flow, shadowed only when floating.
Inter for all chrome; monospace lives strictly inside the terminal.

rules.name: The Color-Means-Status Rule
rules.body: Saturated color is forbidden as decoration. Cyan, green, amber, and red appear only to communicate transport type or connection state.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White-In-Chrome Rule
rules.body: Pure #ffffff belongs to the terminal foreground. Chrome ink tops out at Soft White (#e7e9ee) so the terminal always reads as the brightest surface.

rules.name: The Mono-Stays-Inside Rule
rules.body: Monospace is forbidden in chrome. JetBrains Mono and siblings render only terminal content. UI is always Inter.

rules.name: The Flat-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: No display type. The biggest text on any screen is a 16px title. Importance is weight and ink lightness, never scale.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Demand Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow is a statement that an element is floating — only overlays get one.

rules.name: The No-Light-Slab Rule
rules.body: The Quiet Cockpit has no near-white button. The primary action earns emphasis through a raised dark surface — lighter fill, brighter hairline, inset highlight, heavier weight — never by inverting to a light fill.

dos: Do keep saturated color tied to meaning — ET cyan, Mosh green, amber/red status, and nothing else.
Do cap chrome ink at Soft White (#e7e9ee); reserve pure white for the terminal foreground.
Do keep surfaces flat in-flow and add the Floating shadow only to true overlays.
Do use Inter for every label, button, and field; keep monospace strictly inside the terminal.
Do build hierarchy from weight and ink-lightness — the largest type is a 16px title.
Do let chrome hide itself when there's no choice to make (the tab strip vanishes at one tab).
Do use hairline white-at-low-alpha borders for division, never gray fills.
donts: Don't build an iTerm2-style configurator: no tabs-on-tabs, no floating tool panels, no heavyweight preference dialogs.
Don't introduce a hero or display type tier; importance is weight and ink, not scale.
Don't put a drop shadow on an in-flow row or panel — shadow means floating.
Don't add decorative color, gradients-as-ornament, or glassmorphism; the backdrop blur is for the modal scrim only.
Don't use monospace anywhere in the chrome.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't let any chrome element out-shine the terminal; if it competes for attention, tone it down.
